summary_en: Completed acquisition of 455,400 shares (2.51% of shares outstanding) for ¥999.7M via ToSTNeT-3 and open-market purchase from 14–29 May 2026. Program authorized 14 May as up to 500,000 shares (2.75% S/O) for up to ¥1.0B through 31 May; terminated early following completion.
title_en: Notice of Completion of Own Share Acquisition and Termination of Acquisition Program
translation_en_brief: Sansei Technologies completed a share buyback program on 29 May 2026, acquiring 455,400 ordinary shares for a total of ¥999.7M using ToSTNeT-3 off-market trades and open-market purchases on the Tokyo Stock Exchange. This represents 2.51% of shares outstanding. The board authorized the program on 13 May with an upper limit of 500,000 shares (2.75% S/O) and ¥1.0B, with an execution window through 31 May; the company ceased purchases and terminated the program early after achieving the result. The acquisition was conducted under Company Law Article 165(2) pursuant to bylaws governing own share acquisition.
